description: New Import from Notes page: paste meeting notes, a transcript, or a backlog dump and Lumio turns them into cards using AI. Review every card before importing — edit the title and description, set due dates and priority, pick the board and list for each card (with a remembered default), and assign owners that are auto-matched to your team by name. Set a default assignee for anyone we couldn't match, and reject any card you don't want.
Cards created from a public form now notify the assignee — both via the in-app inbox and an assignment email — matching how assignments work elsewhere in the app.

Fixed a bug where forms with a required hidden Auto Assignee field could not be submitted — the submit button appeared to do nothing. The default assignee is now applied automatically without blocking submission.

Improved the board top bar on mobile. The title now sits on its own line and the action buttons spread evenly across a second row with larger tap targets. The board (...) menu has also been reorganized into clearly labeled sections — Navigate, Configure, Sharing, Settings — with larger text and tap targets on phones.
Fixed a bug where overdue card notifications were sent repeatedly (up to 18 times per day) instead of once. The overdue check now runs once daily at 9 AM ET instead of every 15 minutes.

Backend performance and reliability improvements: form submissions now enforce rate limiting (10 per 5 minutes per IP) to prevent spam, the AI chat assistant loads faster by fetching only the data it needs, board hover prefetch cache now expires in 60 seconds instead of 5 minutes, and startup logging now flags missing environment variables on deploy.

Enhanced sorting on both the boards list and inside each kanban board. The boards list now supports Newest First, A→Z, Last Updated, and a Custom drag-to-reorder mode — all persisted between sessions. Inside a board, you can now sort any column by priority (Urgent → Low) and use the new Sort toolbar control to apply a sort across all columns at once. Column headers show a small badge indicating the active sort.
Added an /update-log page so you can see what's changed in Lumio over time.
Fixed an issue where tapping the date picker inside the card sidebar would accidentally close the sidebar.
You can now embed a form on any external website and copy a ready-to-use code snippet directly from the Forms page.
Public forms can now be fetched and submitted from any domain — CORS support added for embedded form use cases.
Overdue card notifications now check reliably every 15 minutes so you never miss a deadline alert.
